user.title: PAD Romania
user.description: Set up PAD (mandatory home insurance) policy verification. Enter your policy details from padrom.ro.

data_description.serie_polita: Select the policy series prefix (e.g. RA-065)
data_description.cnp_cui: Personal identification number (CNP) or company ID (CUI)
data_description.policy_name: A friendly name for this policy (leave empty for auto-generated)
data_description.update_interval: How often to check policy status (3600-604800 seconds, default 86400)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to padrom.ro. Please try again later.
error.invalid_number: Policy number must contain only digits.

data_description.update_interval: How often to check policy status (3600-604800 seconds)
data_description.alert_preset: When to receive alerts about policy expiry
